trades.reasoning: Score dropped to 40 with MACD below signal line, price below SMA-20, and a volume surge suggesting distribution — rotating capital into higher-momentum names while the gain is still positive
Score 95 with all three bullish signals confirmed — RSI 61.5 in the sweet spot, clean MACD crossover, and price 11% above SMA-20 in a risk-on tape
Score 95 with full RSI and MACD confirmation; semiconductors are a direct beneficiary of today's tech-led risk-on move
Score 95 with RSI 65.8 and clean MACD crossover; consumer beauty offers defensive-growth characteristics while still posting strong momentum

decisions.briefing: Markets are strongly risk-on today with NASDAQ up 1.7% and S&P 500 up 1.1%, led by tech and semiconductors. I rotated out of SYNA, which has turned technically bearish (score 40, MACD bearish, price below SMA-20 with elevated volume), and redeployed into three score-95 names — GLXY, INTC, and ELF — all showing full bullish confirmation. This brings us to 8 positions with minimal idle cash heading into a positive tape.

market_education.summary_en: Equities rallied broadly on Monday as tech stocks led a risk-on session, with the NASDAQ surging 1.7% and the S&P 500 gaining 1.1%. Semiconductor and AI-linked names outperformed as investor sentiment improved following easing trade tensions and cooling inflation expectations. Steady bond yields reduced the opportunity cost of holding equities, reinforcing the rotation into growth stocks.
market_education.summary_zh: 週一美股全面走揚，科技股領漲帶動風險偏好升溫，納斯達克指數勁升1.7%，標普500指數亦上漲1.1%。半導體及AI概念股表現亮眼，受惠於貿易緊張局勢緩解及通脹預期回落，市場信心持續回升。債券收益率維持穩定，降低了持股機會成本，進一步推動資金輪動至成長類股。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Momentum rotation means selling stocks whose price trend is weakening and redeploying that capital into stocks with accelerating momentum. Today SYNA's signals deteriorated — its MACD turned bearish and price slipped below the 20-day moving average — making it a textbook candidate to exit in favor of score-95 names like GLXY, INTC, and ELF that show full technical confirmation.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 動能輪換是指賣出技術趨勢轉弱的股票，並將資金重新配置至動能加速上升的標的。今天SYNA的技術指標惡化——MACD轉為看跌、股價跌破20日均線——成為典型的出場信號，資金因此輪換至GLXY、INTC、ELF等技術面全面確認的95分強勢股。
